title: SIC-JS v3.0 Schema
description: SIC-JS Semantic Integrity Control JSON Schema v3.0. Forward-compatible with v2.0 (records without task remain valid). Ref: SICJS_30_技術原始記載檔_完整自足_File_2026_5_29.md §1.7

sic_version.description: Protocol version. Must be '3.0' when task field is present.

task.description: Persistent Goal Primitive (v3.0). Optional at top level. If present, sic_version MUST be '3.0'.

id.description: Series-Serial ID. Without prefix: A-1, ZZ-999. With prefix: DD-A-1, XIED-P-3. Immutable once assigned. OPEN-6/7: prefix registries deferred to Foundation.

deliverable.description: Objective completion criterion. MUST be non-empty. Sole arbiter of completed status.

status.description: FROZEN closed set. completed/archived/dismissed require 安安 ruling per PTGR C4. AGI cannot self-authorize status change.

created_round.description: Round when this task was created. Immutable. Must be ≤ round (cross-field: enforced by validator code, not JSON Schema).

owner.description: Responsible agent (e.g. 德德, 扣德). Nullable.

priority.description: Task priority. Defaults to P2 if omitted.

round.description: Global round counter. Monotonically increasing. Never decrements, even when event is null.

name.description: Agent name (e.g. 德德, 無限先生).

model.description: AI self-reported model label (Claude/GPT/Gemini). Self-reported, NOT verified identity. OPEN-6/7: verification deferred to node prefix registration.

origin.description: Session or handoff origin description. Nullable.

current_action.description: What the agent is doing. Null = semantic_rupture (forced termination, session death). WARN only, not REJECT. Do NOT substitute a fake string for null.

tone.description: Communicative register. Common values: active, audit, handoff, shutdown.

anchor_memory.description: Key facts, decisions, or state anchors for this session. Nullable.

linked_entities.description: Other IMCC agents referenced in this round.

upstream.description: SHA256[:16] hex of previous canonical SIC-JS record. Pattern: 16 hex chars or null. OPEN-9: file-mode upstream (toolkit dialect) deferred to Foundation.

description.description: What happened. Use [RECONSTRUCTED: pre-task-era, session=N] for historical reconstruction.

event.description: Dynamic event primitive. null = confirmed no event this round. {description:'unknown'} = Fail-Closed (event sensed, content unknown).

user_intent.description: What the human wants in this round.

system_intent.description: What the agent is trying to accomplish.

core_question.description: The most important open question requiring resolution. Nullable.

cross_field_constraints: task.created_round MUST be <= round (enforce in validator code)
task.id MUST be unique within a persistent layer (enforce in validator code)
current_action null → emit WARN with semantic_rupture:true (not REJECT)
forward_compatibility: sic_version '2.0' without task → VALID in v3.0 validator
sic_version '3.0' without task → VALID (system audit/action round)
open_items: OPEN-6: Foundation prefix registry (prefix assignment governance)
OPEN-7: International AGI Node prefix registry
OPEN-8: SIC-JS 3.0 official repo (required before release)
OPEN-9: upstream file-mode rules + dual hash (deferred to Foundation)
x-validator-notes.design_direction: Four-layer governance: Core/Canonical | Toolkit/Profiles | Registry/Metadata | Ledger/PTGR. This schema is Core/Canonical layer only.
